rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Admission; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, October 12, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Rockwell Automation, Inc.¿s motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories and requests for admission is granted. The court only considered the issues addressed in defendant¿s reply brief. Plaintiffs must serve verifications to their supplemental responses to special interrogatories and requests for admission within ten days. Plaintiffs¿ objections to special interrogatory no. 33 are stricken per CCP § 2030.290. Defendant¿s requests for admissions nos. 5, 6, 7 and 10 are deemed admitted. Defendant is awarded sanctions of $1175 (calculated as 5 hours at $235 per hour) because plaintiffs lack substantial justification for their position. Plaintiffs¿ request for sanctions is denied. = (220/HEK)
